questions.question: Describe the key difference between a neural network and a neural Turing machine. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Both concepts involve neural networks, but a neural Turing machine involves a read/write head.

questions.question: What is the primary goal of reinforcement learning? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Reinforcement learning involves an agent learning to take actions to maximize a reward signal.

questions.question: Explain the concept of deep Q-learning. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Deep Q-learning is a type of reinforcement learning that uses a neural network to approximate the action-value function, Q(s,a).
